crypto: secp256r1 / P-256, SIMD-0075 precompile, ECDSA-SHA256, low-S

alsoProvenOn.device: Solana Seeker (Chrome) — real fingerprint -> register -> Loop sign-in, chain logged 'Signal verified'

honestClaims.canSay: Biometric-gated passkey (P-256/secp256r1) bound on-chain with challenge-rotation sign-in, LIVE on Solana mainnet. Real fingerprint, real tx, wrong key rejected on-chain.
doNotSay: first passkey on Solana (passkey wallets exist; novelty is the agent-passport + Loop combo)
audited or production-secure (this is a disclosed unaudited mainnet pilot)

pilotStatus: Disclosed unaudited mainnet pilot. Identity binding only — no funds custody. Reversible (upgrade authority retained). Funds/ZK programs remain fail-closed until audit.
knownLimitation: Phantom in-app browser cannot sign txs containing the secp256r1 precompile. Working client today: no-wallet page in Chrome, or a passkey-native wallet / Mobile Wallet Adapter (follow-up).
